summary: Fail-closed vault scoping and the per-connector refresh lock look correct in this slice, but stdout/stderr redaction still leaks any vault secret shorter than 6 characters.

findings.title: Stateful log redaction still leaves short vault secrets unmasked
findings.recommendation: Do not apply the `length >= 6` filter to vault-derived secret values before persisting logs. Either redact every exact vault value, or use a separate policy for vault values versus heuristic/non-vault strings so a 1-5 character secret cannot be written in cleartext.
